profile.name: Geh Fabris Kum
profile.title: Founder & Lead Developer
profile.bio: A passionate full-stack developer and visionary leader dedicated to crafting innovative digital solutions that empower businesses and delight users.

content.introduction: Hello! I'm Kumi, the driving force behind Kumtech Gateway. With a deep-rooted passion for technology and problem-solving, I founded this company to bridge the gap between great ideas and powerful, functional software. My journey in tech has been fueled by a relentless curiosity and a desire to build things that make a difference.
content.philosophy: I believe in a user-centric approach, where every line of code contributes to a seamless and intuitive experience. My philosophy is built on the pillars of clean code, scalable architecture, and continuous learning. I strive to not just meet requirements, but to exceed expectations and deliver true value.

content.description: Led the design, development, and deployment of over 20 web applications for a diverse range of clients. Managed the full project lifecycle from initial consultation and requirement gathering to final delivery and maintenance. Architected scalable back-end systems and crafted responsive, high-performance front-end interfaces.

Collaborated with small businesses and startups to build their online presence. Specialized in creating custom WordPress themes, e-commerce solutions, and bespoke web applications using the MERN stack.

content.title: E-Commerce Platform for a Local Artisan
content.description: Developed a complete e-commerce solution with a custom CMS, payment gateway integration, and an intuitive product management system. Resulted in a 300% increase in online sales for the client.

content.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
content.description: Architected and built a real-time data visualization dashboard for a marketing agency, using WebSockets to provide live updates and interactive charts. Enabled the client to make faster, data-driven decisions.

content.message: I'm always excited to connect with new people and discuss potential collaborations or interesting projects. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out!
